```{dot}
//| fig-cap: "BPE merges the most frequent adjacent pairs of characters or subwords until the vocabulary is full"
digraph bpe_merges {
  graph [
    rankdir=TB,
    bgcolor="transparent",
    margin=0.15,
    nodesep=0.35,
    ranksep=0.45
  ];
  node [
    shape=box,
    style="rounded",
    fontname="Courier",
    fontsize=12,
    color="#1177BB",
    penwidth=1.5,
    margin="0.12,0.08"
  ];
  edge [
    color="#CC8800",
    penwidth=2,
    arrowsize=0.8
  ];

  start [
    label="Step 0: individual characters\n[t] [o] [k] [e] [n] [i] [z] [a] [t] [i] [o] [n]",
    color="#1177BB"
  ];
  merge [
    label="BPE merges frequent adjacent pairs",
    color="#CC8800"
  ];
  output [
    label="[token] [ization]\nAfter BPE: 2 tokens",
    color="#228811"
  ];

  start -> merge -> output;
}
```
